governance_comment: SEPARATE surface from scripts/stryker-critical.ts's locked-6 (those are PRODUCT modules, governed by ADR-0016 §11). This config mutates the TESTING HARNESS itself — the code every suite trusts — and is governed by ADR-0031 (T18-core). Scope is BOUNDED to three pure, co-located-tested core modules (the scenario runner + two of the seeded determinism doubles) so a local run is fast; the broader harness surface (the pglite fixture, migration discipline, the matchers) is the dispatched nightly extension named in ADR-0031.
baseline_comment: Measured 2026-06-27: 98.15% (53 killed / 54, 1 survived). run-scenario.ts 100%, fake-clock.ts 100%, seeded-randomness.ts 80% — its lone survivor is the `UINT32 - 1` off-by-one boundary mutant (an upper-bound shift on a 2^32 range with no cheap deterministic kill: the low-value-literal survivor class ADR-0016 leaves honest rather than chases). break is a FLOOR under that baseline, not a 100% target.
